name: Savory Stuffed Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------MEAT LOAF STUFFING-----------------------------
Melt the butter or margarine in a large skillet. Add 1/4 cup onion, chopped, and 1/2 cup celery leaves, chopped. Cook until the onion is tender. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients.
Heat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Mix all ingredients except stuffing together. Spread 2/3 of the mixture into an ungreased loaf pan, 9 X 5 X 3 inches. Press mixture up sides of pan within 3/4 inch of top. Spoon stuffing onto mixture in pan, then top with remaining meat mixture, covering stuffing completely.
Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes. Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes before slicing into thick slices. Serve on a heated platter.
